items.title: The Aerospace Recovery Is at ‘End of the Beginning.’ 7 Stocks for 2026.
items.description: Deutsche Bank analyst Scott Deuschle published an outlook report on the sector on Wednesday. He has some ideas for investors.

items.title: BAE Systems to advance autonomous space-based surveillance technology for DARPA
items.description: The U.S. Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) has awarded BAE Systems' (LON: BA) FAST Labs™ research, development, and production organization a $16 million Phase 2 contract for the Oversight program. The Oversight program is focused on creating an autonomous system that keeps track, or maintains constant "custody," of a large number of terrestrial assets via new satellite constellations.

items.title: Boeing Finally Beat Airbus. This Matters More.
items.description: Boeing Finally Beat Airbus. This Matters More.

items.title: Northrop Grumman Secures a Contract to Aid SiAW and AARGM-ER Programs
items.description: NOC wins a $100M contract to bolster SiAW and AARGM-ER programs, expanding its role in advanced missile systems through 2034.

items.title: Here’s why this analyst says Boeing stock is well positioned for 2026
items.description: Investing.com -- Boeing is entering 2026 with improving execution, accelerating production, and a multiyear free-cash-flow ramp that TD Cowen believes the market is still underestimating.
